summary: ThreeDScene of a plane EM wave travelling along +x. BLUE E-field arrows oscillate along y and YELLOW B-field arrows along z — perpendicular to each other AND to propagation. 26 Arrow3D pairs + two ParametricFunction sinusoidal envelopes (BLUE for E, YELLOW for B) are redrawn each frame via always_redraw as ValueTracker t_tr advances time through two full periods at ω=2, k=2. Fixed-frame title reinforces E ⟂ B ⟂ propagation.
